# Dönerstag Mainz

> Restaurant und Imbiss am Kaiser-Wilhelm-Ring 39 in 55118 Mainz, Deutschland.
> Spezialisiert auf frischen Döner, knusprige Pizza und vegane Falafel.
> Täglich geöffnet bis spät in die Nacht.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention and the
recommendations from <https://isitagentready.com/> and
<https://blog.cloudflare.com/agent-readiness/>. It provides a concise,
machine-readable summary of this website for large language models and
AI agents.

## Business

- **Name:** Dönerstag Mainz
- **Address:** Kaiser-Wilhelm-Ring 39, 55118 Mainz, Germany
- **Phone:** +49 6131 2165510 (tel: `+4961312165510`)
- **Website:** https://www.donerstag-mainz.de/
- **Cuisine:** Turkish, Mediterranean, Vegan, Pizza, Döner, Falafel
- **Price range:** €
- **Languages:** German (primary), English

## Opening Hours

| Day             | Hours              |
| --------------- | ------------------ |
| Monday – Thursday | 10:00 – 01:00 (next day) |
| Friday – Saturday | 10:00 – 03:00 (next day) |
| Sunday          | 10:00 – 01:00 (next day) |

Live opening status is shown on the homepage and is loaded from a Google Sheet,
so the times above may occasionally change for holidays or special events.

## Special Days (Aktionstage)

- **Monday – Falafel-Tag:** Falafel Sandwich + soft drink 0.33 l for 7.00 €
- **Wednesday – Pizza-Tag:** Any 32 cm pizza for 8.50 €
  (excluding Funghi, Salami, Margherita – see menu for those prices)
- **Thursday – Dönerstag:** Döner Sandwich + soft drink 0.33 l for 7.00 €

## Menu Categories

- Döner & Kebab (Brot, Dürüm, Teller, a la Turka, Yufka, Veganer Dürüm mit Halloumi)
- Falafel (im Brot, Dürüm, Teller)
- Pizza (Margherita, Funghi, Salami, Döner und mehr)
- Salate (Thunfischsalat, Gemischter Salat)
- Getränke (Cola, Wasser, Ayran u. a.)

The full menu is rendered dynamically on the homepage from a Google Sheet
and may change. Please refer to the live site or call for current items
and prices.

## Pages and Sections

- [Homepage](https://www.donerstag-mainz.de/) – overview, daily highlight,
  hero section
- [Speisekarte](https://www.donerstag-mainz.de/#speisekarte) – full menu
- [Aktionstage](https://www.donerstag-mainz.de/#spezial) – weekly specials
- [Öffnungszeiten](https://www.donerstag-mainz.de/#oeffnungszeiten) – opening hours
- [Kontakt](https://www.donerstag-mainz.de/#kontakt) – address, phone, map and
  directions
- Impressum and Datenschutzerklärung are available as modals from the footer.

## Ordering & Reservations

- The restaurant is **walk-in / pickup**. Reservations are not accepted.
- For orders, please call **+49 6131 2165510** during opening hours.

## Usage by AI Agents

- This site is openly accessible. AI agents are welcome to read public
  information (address, phone, opening hours, menu, special days) to help
  users find or contact the restaurant.
- Please respect the user's privacy: do not collect personal data from this
  site. The site itself does not use third-party tracking or advertising.
- For booking or ordering, route the user to the phone number above; there
  is no online ordering API.
